# CASE: tab-case-013-settings-device-ip-display

> Settings page "IP Address" showed `172.21.112.1` (WSL2 NAT gateway) for every tablet instead
> of each device's real LAN IP. Frontend-only fix — WebRTC first priority, correct private-IP
> filter, priority inversion fixed. Merged via PR #205.

## Tier
1 — UI-only, single page + utility. No API or schema change.

## Branch
claude/refine-local-plan-a7w26b (merged via PR #205)

## Problem

The Settings page "IP Address" field always showed `172.21.112.1` (the WSL2 NAT gateway)
regardless of the actual device. All tablets appeared identical.

Two compounding bugs:
1. `utils/getLocalIp.ts` — `else` branch resolved immediately on non-private candidates,
   allowing a public/reflexive STUN candidate to win before any private LAN IP was emitted.
2. `pages/settings.vue` — `getLocalIpAddress` tried `last_ip_address` (backend-stored WSL2
   gateway) before WebRTC; `displayIpAddress` always preferred `device.ip_address` (also
   the gateway) over the WebRTC result.

## Success Criterion

Settings page shows each tablet's real LAN IP (e.g. `192.168.x.x`) on a physical LAN;
falls back to `device.ip_address` when WebRTC is blocked or returns a non-private IP.

## Files Changed

- `utils/getLocalIp.ts` — buffered non-private candidates; private IPs still resolve immediately
- `pages/settings.vue` — WebRTC-first priority; `isPrivateLanIp` guard; `displayIpAddress` prefers local WebRTC IP when it is a private-range address
- `docs/LESSONS.md` — new lessons doc (created in the tablet-pwa repo)
- `docs/cases/tab-case-013-settings-device-ip-display.md` (tablet-pwa local tracking doc)

## Verification

PASS (2026-06-14): `npm run typecheck` + `npm run lint` clean. Manual: Settings IP field shows
real LAN IP on physical network; shows `device.ip_address` fallback in WSL2 dev.
